title: CI flake: Podman run/create two containers with the same IP
body:
Although it's not a frequent flake, it's still a flake, and should be fixed:

Podman run with --ip flag [It] Podman run two containers with the same IP
* fedora-31 : in-podman fedora-31
  * PR #6783
    * [06-25 18:11](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-5385732420009984-fcae48/artifacts/containers/libpod/5092539076182016/html/integration_test.log.html#t--Podman-run-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--1)
    * [06-25 18:11](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-5385732420009984-fcae48/artifacts/containers/libpod/5092539076182016/html/integration_test.log.html#t--Podman-run-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--2)
* fedora-31 : test fedora-31
  * PR #6372
    * [05-27 03:27](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-5385732420009984-fcae48/artifacts/containers/libpod/4749736102068224/html/integration_test.log.html#t--Podman-run-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--1)
* fedora-31-podman-5869602141896704 : in-podman fedora-31
  * PR #7079
    * [07-25 06:21](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/6578429166354432/html/integration_test.log.html#t--Podman-run-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--1)
    * [07-25 06:21](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/6578429166354432/html/integration_test.log.html#t--Podman-run-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--2)
    * [07-25 06:21](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/6578429166354432/html/integration_test.log.html#t--Podman-run-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--3)
* ubuntu-19 : test ubuntu-19
  * PR #6794
    * [06-29 11:27](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-5385732420009984-fcae48/artifacts/containers/libpod/4686879750619136/html/integration_test.log.html#t--Podman-run-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--1)
    * [06-29 11:27](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-5385732420009984-fcae48/artifacts/containers/libpod/4686879750619136/html/integration_test.log.html#t--Podman-run-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--2)
    * [06-29 11:27](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-5385732420009984-fcae48/artifacts/containers/libpod/4686879750619136/html/integration_test.log.html#t--Podman-run-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--3)
* ubuntu-20 : test ubuntu-20
  * PR #6609
    * [06-15 10:43](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-5385732420009984-fcae48/artifacts/containers/libpod/4692372711800832/html/integration_test.log.html#t--Podman-run-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--1)


Podman create with --ip flag [It] Podman create two containers with the same IP
* fedora-31 : in-podman fedora-31
  * PR #6783
    * [06-25 18:11](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-5385732420009984-fcae48/artifacts/containers/libpod/5092539076182016/html/integration_test.log.html#t--Podman-create-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--1)
* fedora-31-podman-5869602141896704 : in-podman fedora-31
  * PR #7079
    * [07-25 06:21](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/6578429166354432/html/integration_test.log.html#t--Podman-create-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--1)
    * [07-25 06:21](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/6578429166354432/html/integration_test.log.html#t--Podman-create-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--2)
* ubuntu-19 : test ubuntu-19
  * PR #6794
    * [06-29 11:27](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-5385732420009984-fcae48/artifacts/containers/libpod/4686879750619136/html/integration_test.log.html#t--Podman-create-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--1)
    * [06-29 11:27](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-5385732420009984-fcae48/artifacts/containers/libpod/4686879750619136/html/integration_test.log.html#t--Podman-create-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--2)

I tried to fix this some months ago in #5286 but obviously there's still something I missed.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

None of these flaked three times, so they shouldn't've triggered an actual CI run failure, but some day it will again.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

* prior-fedora : test prior-fedora
  * PR #7729
    * [09-22 13:56](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/6368645309792256/html/integration_test.log.html#t--Podman-run-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--1)

* prior-fedora : test prior-fedora
  * PR #7729
    * [09-22 13:56](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/6368645309792256/html/integration_test.log.html#t--Podman-create-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--1)
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
cirrus-flake-summarize reports no incidents since 09-28, which is right around the time that @Luap99 merged #7835 so maybe this is fixed?
Maybe is good enough for me.  We will reopen if it happens again.

It's back. Reopening.

A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Sigh. Last seen on April 6; I guess that means I close it and reopen it when it happens again.

Another one. This still is not fixed:

###  Podman run with --ip flag [It] Podman run two containers with the same IP
* fedora-33 : int podman fedora-33 root host
  * PR #10970
    * [07-20 12:27](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/5111577587220480/html/int-podman-fedora-33-root-host.log.html#t--Podman-run-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--1)
    * [07-20 12:27](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/5111577587220480/html/int-podman-fedora-33-root-host.log.html#t--Podman-run-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--2)
    * [07-20 12:27](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/5111577587220480/html/int-podman-fedora-33-root-host.log.html#t--Podman-run-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--3)

Leaving the issue closed because I know nobody is going to look into it, so I'm saving future-me the time it takes, 30 days hence, to context-switch back into this and sigh and close it.

-------------

UPDATE: the above failures are in the `run` test; this same CI run, on the same PR, also failed in the `create` test, but only once, not three times:

### Podman create with --ip flag [It] Podman create two containers with the same IP
* fedora-33 : int podman fedora-33 root host
  * PR #10970
    * [07-20 12:27](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/5111577587220480/html/int-podman-fedora-33-root-host.log.html#t--Podman-create-two-containers-with-the-same-IP--1)

And again, a triple failure causing a CI failure, but it's in [f33](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/5470368979746816/html/int-podman-fedora-33-root-container.log.html) on an old branch so I'm not bothering to reopen.

This just popped up again after many months of absence; but it's in test runs also affected by #14331 (the horrible sctp one)
